retrieved_result: Frequently Asked Questions "Frequently Asked Questions Is the Rosicrucian Order, AMORC, a Religion? No. AMORC, which stands for Ancient and Mystical Order Rosae Crucis, is not a religion and does not require a specific code of belief or conduct. Rosicrucian students come from a variety of cultural and religious backgrounds. B
